title: Chapter 14 - Deployment & Security Basics
description: Quick checks on deployment models and basic security.

questions.prompt: What is the primary purpose of a load balancer?

options.label: To distribute incoming traffic across multiple servers

explanations.overview: Load balancers help scale and provide redundancy by distributing requests.

byOptionId.b: Correct — load balancers distribute traffic to backends.

questions.prompt: Why should you use HTTPS for your site?

options.label: It removes the need for backups
It makes the site load instantly
It encrypts traffic and protects user data

explanations.overview: HTTPS encrypts traffic and verifies server identity.

byOptionId.d: Correct — HTTPS secures data in transit.

questions.prompt: Which deployment approach packages an app with its environment for consistency?

options.label: Editing HTML directly on the server

explanations.overview: Containers package an app and its dependencies to run consistently across environments.

byOptionId.d: Correct — containers provide environment consistency for deployments.
